docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FREEDOM MORTGAGE CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY SMITH, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM MORTGAGE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA SERVICE FEE: $125.00 ORIGINAL SUBPOENA NOT RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, WILLIAM SERVED FEB-04-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM MORTGAGE CORPORATION
